description: Opening welcome screen for the AI observability story. Hero title, the four spectra, the fifth signal (conversations), the singularity (conversation walks down to SQL), five nav cards for the journey, and a live 24h KPI strip.

options.content:
Grafana Labs. Observability for AI.

AI Observability
with Grafana Labs

Where conversations join the OTel stack.

The Thesis

AI changed the time to value of observability. Now observability changes the time to value of AI.

panels.title: The four spectra. Engineering loves the right side. AI lives on the left. Observability is the bridge.

options.content:
ProductionDevelopment
Engineering AI today

Customer facingInternal
Engineering AI today

DeterministicProbabilistic
Engineering AI today

ObjectiveSubjective
Engineering AI today

panels.title: The fifth signal. Conversations branch from traces. Every conversation is a trace, but not every trace is a conversation.

options.content:
Metrics
Logs
Traces
Profiles
Conversations
Metrics, logs, traces, profiles. The four classical signals of OpenTelemetry. The fifth signal, conversations, branches from traces.

panels.title: The singularity. From any conversation, walk down to the SQL that broke.

options.content:
From a conversation, you can walk down to the trace that produced it, the tool the model called, the database it queried, the error on Postgres, and the SQL itself.Observability is the control plane for AI systems.

💬Conversation
v
🧭Trace
v
🛠Tool call
v
⚠DB error
v
𝐒SQL

What this enables

One observability stack.

Five signals.

Every layer of an AI system, queryable from the same place.

panels.title: The path ahead. Five views, one journey.

panels.title: Highlights from the last 24 hours. Live signals from a real AI system.
Tokens served (24h)
panels.description: Total LLM tokens (input + output) the platform processed in the trailing 24 hours.

panels.title: Cost, local marginal
panels.description: What the on-prem traffic cost over the last 24h at a $0.20/Mtok all-in rate (electricity + amortization).

panels.title: Cost, equivalent Anthropic
panels.description: What the same 24h of token volume would have cost on Anthropic Claude Sonnet ($3/$15 per 1M input/output tokens; falls back to a $5.40/Mtok blend when token_type is absent).

panels.title: Savings
panels.description: Percent saved by running local vs the equivalent Anthropic cost over the last 24h. 90% or better lights up sky-blue.

panels.title: Conversations (24h)
panels.description: Total evaluated conversations in the last 24h, as recorded by the Sigil evaluator pipeline.

panels.title: Evaluations passed (24h)
panels.description: Percentage of Sigil evaluator runs in the trailing 24h whose status was success.

title: AI Observability with Grafana Labs
